Options.OPTION_DESCRIPTION[RealisticJobS: How strongly job availability increases the chance a job is accepted. Higher = big workplaces pull more strongly.
How quickly long trips become unattractive. Higher = avoids long commutes more aggressively.
Writes a CSV with commute stats to the ModsData folder.
Highest possible chance to accept even a perfect job. Lowers this to keep some variety/randomness.
Lowest possible chance to accept any job. Raises this to keep rare options from being fully ruled out.
How much to favor workplaces that currently have free positions. Higher = more bias to places with open slots.
How much to favor larger workplaces (more total jobs), even if not all are open. Higher = more bias to big employers.
